title: The raw fastq data used to assemble the genome of an alpine butterfly Parnassius epaphus.
author: GUAN, DELONG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The raw fastq data used to assemble the genome of an alpine butterfly Parnassius epaphus.  Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing was performed at HaoRui genomics Bio-Tech (Xi'an, China) using a GridION X5 sequencer. High molecular weight DNA was prepared using the SQK-LSK109 ligation sequencing kit following the manufacturer's instructions.
steps_raw: The raw fastq data used to assemble the genome of an alpine butterfly Parnassius epaphus.  Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing was performed at HaoRui genomics Bio-Tech (Xi'an, China) using a GridION X5 sequencer. High molecular weight DNA was prepared using the SQK-LSK109 ligation sequencing kit following the manufacturer's instructions.
